summary_note: Manual snapshot refreshed against official provider pricing pages on June 18, 2026. API prices are list prices per 1M tokens unless a row explicitly notes a current promotion, region, or tier.
history_note: History lines use official pricing snapshots that are stored in this repo. Some providers only have one official snapshot recorded so far, while others mix successive flagship or promo models.

api_pricing.notes: OpenAI developer pricing lists GPT-5.5 as a flagship model at the standard <272K-context tier; regional processing endpoints carry a 10% uplift.

Current Gemini API paid-tier standard pricing for Gemini 3.5 Flash. Google describes it as its most intelligent model built for speed; context-cache storage is listed separately at $1.00 / 1M tokens per hour.
Google's current Gemini Developer API pricing page lists Gemma 4 with free input, output, and context caching, while the paid tier remains unavailable.

Anthropic pricing lists Opus 4.8 as ideal for complex agentic coding and enterprise work. Prompt-cache writes are $6.25 / 1M tokens. Fable 5 is listed at $10 / $50 but is unavailable, so it is not used as the active API row.
Official DeepSeek V4 Flash overseas pricing. The compatibility names deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner are scheduled for deprecation on 2026-07-24 15:59 UTC.
Official DeepSeek V4 Pro overseas pricing as listed on the current models and pricing page.
Alibaba Cloud Model Studio now lists qwen3-max above qwen-max. International tiered pricing is $1.20/$6.00 up to 32K tokens, $2.40/$12.00 from 32K to 128K, and $3.00/$15.00 from 128K to 252K.
Together AI's public serverless price for Z AI's GLM-5. The public model page does not list a separate cached-input rate.
Meta's Llama 4 Maverick served through Together AI's public serverless API. Meta's public developer docs describe the model family, while Together AI exposes a comparable public token price.
Kimi K2.7 Code is Kimi’s current most capable coding model. The high-speed variant is $1.90 cache-miss input, $0.38 cache-hit input, and $8.00 output per 1M tokens.
Official overseas pricing for Xiaomi's flagship MiMo-V2.5-Pro / MiMo-V2-Pro tier. For prompts above 256K tokens, Xiaomi lists $2.00 input, $0.40 cached input, and $6.00 output per 1M tokens.

Current MiniMax pay-as-you-go text pricing for MiniMax-M3 standard service after the listed permanent 50% discount. Prompts above 512K are listed at ¥4.20 input, ¥0.84 cache read, and ¥16.80 output while limited supply applies; priority service is 1.5x standard pricing.
xAI docs list Grok 4.3 at $1.25 input, $0.20 cached input, and $2.50 output per 1M tokens.
GitHub Copilot is sold as a subscription product. GitHub does not publicly publish a Copilot per-token API price comparable to the other vendors here.

subscription_pricing.notes: Consumer plan. API usage is billed separately.

subscription_pricing.price_display: $25 / user / month billed annually or $30 monthly
subscription_pricing.notes: Shared workspace for teams and growing businesses.
5x more usage than Pro. Includes Claude Code.
20x more usage than Pro. Includes Claude Code.

subscription_pricing.price_display: $25 / seat / month billed annually, $30 billed monthly
subscription_pricing.notes: Standard team seats. Anthropic also lists premium seats at $150 / member / month, including Claude Code and higher usage.
Formerly AI Premium. Consumer plan with Gemini app, Flow, NotebookLM and more.
Highest Google AI subscription tier for the Gemini app and related tools.
Official monthly Token Plan tiers: Lite, Standard, Pro, and Max. The package covers MiMo-V2.5-Pro, MiMo-V2.5, and the rest of Xiaomi's current V2 / V2.5 programming-tool lineup.
Official annual Token Plan tiers: Lite, Standard, Pro, and Max.

subscription_pricing.price_display: $40 / month in the US web pricing table
subscription_pricing.notes: Help.x.com ties Premium+ to expanded Grok access. Regional prices vary.
Higher premium-request limits and broader model access.

openai.label: OpenAI
openai.note: Flagship OpenAI checkpoints stored in this repo. The latest snapshot reflects GPT-5.5 pricing from OpenAI's developer pricing page.

google.label: Google
google.note: Gemini values here use the paid standard tier from the public Gemini API pricing page.

anthropic.label: Anthropic
anthropic.note: Claude Opus 4.8 is Anthropic’s current available top Opus row on the public pricing page; Fable 5 is listed but unavailable.

deepseek.label: DeepSeek
deepseek.note: This line compares official DeepSeek API price checkpoints in CNY per 1M tokens. The latest point reflects V4 Flash after the 2026-04-26 cache-hit reduction.

qwen.label: Qwen / Alibaba Cloud
qwen.note: qwen3-max current International snapshot from Alibaba Cloud Model Studio, using the <=32K-token tier.

kimi.label: Moonshot / Kimi
kimi.note: Kimi history uses current Kimi API Platform USD pricing pages only; older Moonshot CNY blog rows are omitted from this chart to avoid mixing currencies.

minimax.label: MiniMax
minimax.note: MiniMax current pay-as-you-go text snapshot in CNY per 1M tokens, using standard service effective discounted prices where the official page lists a permanent discount.

xai.label: xAI
xai.note: Current public xAI API pricing snapshot.

together_glm.label: Together AI / GLM-5
together_glm.note: Together AI's public GLM-5 model page. This history line grows only when Together AI's public GLM-5 price changes.

meta_llama_together.label: Meta / Llama 4 Maverick (Together AI)
meta_llama_together.note: Public Together AI pricing for Meta's Llama 4 Maverick endpoint. This history line is a public comparable endpoint rather than Meta's first-party internal pricing.

xiaomi.label: Xiaomi / MiMo
xiaomi.note: Official Xiaomi MiMo overseas flagship pricing. This history line starts with MiMo-V2.5-Pro, the current flagship programming model family.

subscription_missing_note: Some vendors in the API table are omitted here because I could not find a public official subscription plan for them in the sources checked for this snapshot: DeepSeek, Qwen / Alibaba Cloud, Moonshot AI / Kimi.

benchmark_snapshot.note: Top 10 current models by Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index. Prices and speeds below come from Artificial Analysis' benchmark snapshot, so they may differ from the manual API rows above when multiple deployments or reasoning modes exist.

models.model: Claude Fable 5 (Adaptive Reasoning, Max Effort, Opus 4.8 Fallback)

provider_leaderboard.note: Each provider rank uses that provider's best currently benchmarked endpoint for the selected metric, so the representative model can change across metrics.

intelligence.label: Intelligence Index
intelligence.description: Higher is better. Ranked by each provider's strongest currently benchmarked endpoint.

price.label: Blended price
price.description: Lower is better. Ranked by the provider's lowest currently benchmarked blended USD price (3:1 input/output mix).

latency.label: Latency
latency.description: Lower is better. Ranked by median time to first token for the provider's fastest currently benchmarked endpoint.

context_window.label: Context window
context_window.description: Higher is better. Ranked by the provider's largest currently benchmarked context window.

scale_price_frontier.note: Lines start in 2021 and combine curated source-backed historical records with the latest Artificial Analysis model metadata. Model size tracks the largest open-weight/open-access LLM by total disclosed parameters for each year, so sparse MoE and dense models are not quality-equivalent. Output-token price uses public USD text-token API prices and excludes tool-call, image, audio, video, and subscription pricing.

model_size.label: Largest open-weight LLM size
model_size.description: Largest reviewed open-weight/open-access LLM size by year, measured in total disclosed parameters.

rows.note: Open model under Falcon license; 180B parameters.
Open-weight MoE; 671B total parameters and 37B active parameters.
Open-weight MoE; 1T total parameters and 32B active parameters.
Open-weight MoE; 1.6T total parameters and 49B active parameters.

output_price.label: Most expensive output token
output_price.description: Highest reviewed public text-output token price by year since 2021.

rows.note: Legacy GPT-3 era price converted from $0.06 per 1K tokens.
Legacy GPT-3 era price converted from $0.06 per 1K tokens.
Output price for the 32K GPT-4 API tier.
Output price for the 32K GPT-4 API tier.
Highest public text-output token price found in the reviewed sources.
